What We Do

Complete Roofing
Solutions

From new installations to emergency repairs and full waterproofing systems — Kimbo handles every aspect of your roof with skill and integrity.

Roof Installation

New roofs built to last using premium materials and expert craftsmanship. Concrete tiles, IBR sheeting, standing seam — any style, built right.

Roof Repairs

Fast, reliable repairs that stop leaks and extend your roof's lifespan. Same-day emergency callouts available across Cape Town.

Waterproofing

Torch-on bitumen membranes, liquid applied coatings, and fibreglass systems. Total protection against Cape Town's notorious rain and south-easter winds.

Gutter Systems

Installation and maintenance of durable aluminium and UPVC gutters. Properly channelled water keeps your foundations and walls safe.

Roof Inspections

Thorough condition assessments with detailed written reports. Catch problems early before they become costly disasters.

Why Choose Us

Built on Quality.
Backed by Trust.

We don't just fix roofs — we protect homes and businesses. Every team member is skilled, every material is premium, every job has our name on it.

Premium Materials Only
We use trusted brands like Colin, Perma-Torch and Bulldog — no shortcuts, no cheap substitutes.
Experienced Team
Skilled craftsmen with over 15 years of combined experience on residential and commercial projects.
On-Time, Every Time
We respect your schedule and always deliver on the agreed timeline without sacrificing quality.
Fully Insured & Compliant
All work meets South African building standards. Full safety compliance on every job site.

Proudly Serving
Cape Town & Surrounds

From the Atlantic Seaboard to the Winelands, the Southern Suburbs to the Northern Suburbs — Kimbo Roofing is your local expert, wherever you are in the Cape Peninsula.
